question:
Will Barnsley FC vs. York City FC end in a draw?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 1, 2025
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".

Resolution source: https://www.thefa.com/competitions/thefacup

evidences.title: Barnsley FC vs York City | Emirates FA Cup | Match & Ticket Details | York City Football Club
evidences.content: York City Football Club York City Football Club # Barnsley FC vs York City | Emirates FA Cup | Match & Ticket Details Match and ticket details have been confirmed for our Emirates FA Cup First Round tie away at Barnsley. The fixture will take place on Saturday, 1st November (3pm kick-off) at Oakwell. We have been handed an initial allocation of 2,000 tickets and away fans will be housed in the North Stand for the game. ##### TICKETS City supporters will be able to purchase tickets online HERE from Tuesday 21st October at 10am. The link will go live at that time. We strongly advise all supporters to purchase in advance. [...] ##### MATCH DETAILS The winner of the tie will earn a place in the Emirates FA Cup Second Round. Should the match be drawn after 90 minutes, we will enter an additional 30 minutes of extra time. Failing that, the tie will be decided by a penalty shootout. ##### TRAVEL WITH YORK PULLMAN York Pullman will be running a bus to the fixture. Departure from Memorial Gardens in York city centre will be 12pm, with collection in Acomb 10 minutes later. Payments for travel need to be made in advance, with no cash being take on the day of travel. To book a place on the...

evidences.title: Match Preview | Barnsley FC (A) | Saturday 1st November | York City Football Club
evidences.content: York City Football Club York City Football Club # Match Preview | Barnsley FC (A) | Saturday 1st November York City will be looking to cause an upset in the Emirates FA Cup this weekend when we make the journey to Oakwell for the first time in 10 years to face Barnsley FC, with kick-off at 3 pm. City were held at FC Halifax Town last weekend, where a dominant performance could only see the Minstermen leave with a single point. Ollie Pearce was the man to score once more as his 85th-minute goal snatched the win off the Shaymen. Barnsley, however, suffered defeat to local rivals Rotherham at Oakwell last weekend when a single Kian Spence goal was enough to ensure the Reds went five league games without a victory. [...] We would also like to remind supporters travelling by coach that there is a strict ‘no alcohol’ policy on board. ##### KEEP UPDATED The best way to follow the game is in person. There will also be… York City is proud of our rich history and giant killing success for over a century. We are York! © York City Football Club Ltd. evidences.content:  The referee must not compensate for a timekeeping error during the first half by changing the length of the second half. 4. Penalty kick  If a penalty kick has to be taken or retaken, the half is extended until the penalty kick is completed. 5. Abandoned match  An abandoned match is replayed unless the competition rules or organisers determine otherwise. 91 Laws of the Game 2025/26 | Law 8 | The Start and Restart of Play  A kick-off starts both halves of a match, both halves of extra time and restarts play after a goal has been scored. Free kicks (direct or indirect), penalty kicks, throw-ins, goal kicks and corner kicks are other restarts (see Laws 13–17). A dropped ball is the restart when the referee stops play and the Law does not require one of the above restarts. [...]  When competition rules require a winning team after a drawn match or home-and-away tie, the only permitted procedures to determine the winning team are: • away goals rule • two equal periods of extra time not exceeding 15 minutes each • penalties (penalty shoot-out) A combination of the above procedures may be used. 3. evidences.title: FA Cup - Wikipedia
evidences.content: Until 2024-25, rounds up to and including the fourth round proper, fixtures resulting in a draw (after normal time) went to a replay "Replay (sports)"), played at the venue of the away team, at a later date; if that replay was still tied, the winner was settled by a period of extra time "Overtime (sports)"), and if still necessary, a penalty shootout "Penalty shoot-out (association football)"). Since 2016–17, ties have been settled on the day from the quarter-finals onwards, using extra time and penalties. From 2018–19, Fifth round ties have also been settled by extra time and penalties. Beginning with the 2024–25 competition, replays have been scrapped from the first round onwards to accommodate the expanded schedule of UEFA Champions League and UEFA Europa League. The decision to scrap [...] 2014–15 2015–16 2016–17 2017–18 2018–19 2019–20 2020–21 2021–22 2022–23 2023–24 2024–25 2025–26 2026–27") | [...] Most wins: 14, Arsenal (1930, 1936, 1950, 1971, 1979, 1993, 1998, 2002, 2003, 2005, 2014, 2015, 2017, 2020) Most consecutive wins: 3, joint record: + Wanderers (1876, 1877, 1878) + Blackburn Rovers (1884, 1885, 1886) Most appearances in a final: 22 + Manchester United (1909, 19...

evidences.title: What happens in case of a tie after 90 minutes in the FA Cup? - AS USA
evidences.content: Traditionally, tied games were replayed at the home of the visiting team. Since the start of the 2024/25 season, however, all games from the first round onward that end in a draw after 90 minutes are decided on the same day. Why? Mainly because of an already congested fixture list, especially for the big boys facing European competition. ## What happens if it’s a tie in the FA Cup: extra-time, penalties… If the two teams are still level after regulation, 30 minutes of extra time - split into two 15-minute halves - will be played. If the score remains tied, a penalty shootout determines which team advances. Only one of the 16 fourth-round games was decided by a shootout, that of Birmingham vs Leeds, the visitors winning it 4-2 after the whistle blew at 1-1. [...] Defending champions Crystal Palace suffered a stunning defeat to sixth-tier Macclesfield in the third round, marking the FA Cup’s biggest ever shock based on the difference in league positions. Mansfield are hoping to cause just as much of a stir but face the daunting task of defeating current top dogs in England, the Gunners. > The schedule for the #EmiratesFACup fifth round proper has been announced 📺🏆 > > — Emirates F...

evidences.title: Match Preview | Barnsley FC (H) | Saturday 11th July | York City Football Club
evidences.content: York City Football Club York City Football Club # Match Preview | Barnsley FC (H) | Saturday 11th July York City get underway in pre-season with a Saturday home fixture against League One Barnsley this weekend. This will be the first football match the Minstermen have taken part in since the dramatic draw at Rochdale in April which clinched the National League title Our opponents Barnsley will be looking to build on their win at Matlock last weekend under new manager Daniel Stendel. Both City and the Reds came face to face twice last season in pre-season and the FA Cup. ##### TICKETS Tickets are still available for this fixture. You can purchase yours by clicking HERE. ##### WATCH LIVE All streaming passes are available for £10 and will be provided by 247.tv. [...] York Pullman will not be operating the Y22 service. First Bus will operate the number 9 as normal. ##### KEEP UPDATED The best way to follow the game is in the ground.
